fixes.origin:
base = (
    "SELECT id, subject, status, created_at "
    "FROM tickets "
    "WHERE subject ILIKE '%" + q + "%' "
)

if status:
    base += "AND status = '" + status + "' "

base += "ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT $1"

rows = await conn.fetch(base, limit)
fixes.replacement:
base = (
    "SELECT id, subject, status, created_at "
    "FROM tickets "
    "WHERE subject ILIKE $1 "
)

args = [f"%{q}%"]

if status:
    base += "AND status = $2 "
    args.append(status)

base += "ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT $" + str(len(args) + 1)
args.append(limit)

rows = await conn.fetch(base, *args)
